name: garmin-local-mcp
description: Local-first Garmin data warehouse with an analysis-grade MCP server. Sync once, analyze forever, even when the API is down.
long_description:
Syncs your Garmin Connect data incrementally into a local warehouse you own (immutable raw JSON plus SQLite), then answers analytical questions with 12 curated tools that compute trends, correlations, personal baselines, and anomalies server-side and return compact tables instead of raw API dumps. All analysis keeps working offline when Garmin's unofficial API breaks, and a zero-auth FIT importer ingests manually exported wellness bundles with no login at all.

Requires [uv](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/getting-started/installation/) on your PATH; the extension installs and runs the server from PyPI via uvx, no manual Python setup.

Note: the one-time `login` and the initial history backfill are CLI steps. After installing this extension, run `uvx garmin-local-mcp login` and `uvx garmin-local-mcp sync --from <date>` in a terminal once. See the README for details.

data_dir.title: Data directory
data_dir.description: Where your synced Garmin data lives (raw JSON snapshots, SQLite warehouse, and login tokens). Use the same directory the CLI uses.

tools.name: auth_status
tools.description: Check whether stored Garmin Connect tokens exist

tools.name: sync
tools.description: Fetch up to 60 days from Garmin Connect into the local store

tools.name: sync_status
tools.description: Local data coverage per table, last sync time, pending errors

tools.name: get_day
tools.description: One merged view of a single day: wellness, sleep, HRV, training, activities

tools.name: query_metrics
tools.description: Columnar time series for metrics between two dates, with aggregation

tools.name: correlate
tools.description: Pearson/Spearman correlation between two metrics, with day-lag support

tools.name: baselines
tools.description: Personal mean and sd band per metric over a trailing window

tools.name: anomalies
tools.description: Outlier days (z-score) and sustained streaks vs personal baseline

tools.name: list_activities
tools.description: Recent activities as a compact table, filterable

tools.name: get_activity
tools.description: Full stored summary row for one activity

tools.name: gaps
tools.description: Missing days per table plus unresolved sync errors

tools.name: import_fit
tools.description: Zero-auth offline ingest of an exported Garmin wellness FIT bundle
